environmentConstraint: CORRECTED: a local durable database IS available (better-sqlite3, verified working; docker-compose Postgres also present). The canonical persistence round-trip is now BUILT + PROVEN against a real SQLite database (sqlite-interaction-store + sqlite-outbox-store, with write→read→tenant-isolation→correction-version→deletion→replay-block + cross-connection disk durability). The only capability still requiring a running app instance is the RENDERED Next.js Decision Centre / observability PAGE (the read-model logic is built + proven; the page render needs the app or a component-render harness). See local-runtime-capability-report.json.

genuinelyRemainingNeedsRunningApp: Render the Decision Centre twin-snapshot Next.js PAGE over buildTwinSnapshotView + the admin observability page over the outbox store. The read-model + persistence logic is BUILT and PROVEN (durable SQLite round-trip); only the rendered page + auth-in-request needs a running Next.js app instance or a component-render harness. This is a page-wiring task, not a logic gap.
